things.name: Table Mountain National Park
things.description: Cable car to the iconic flat-topped mountain with 360° views over two oceans

things.name: Robben Island
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage prison island where Nelson Mandela was held for 18 years

things.name: Cape of Good Hope
things.description: The dramatic southwestern tip of Africa where the Atlantic and Indian Oceans converge

things.name: V&A Waterfront
things.description: Spectacular working harbour with the best restaurants, shops and views in Cape Town

things.name: Bo-Kaap (Malay Quarter)
things.description: Brightly coloured Cape Malay houses on cobblestone streets - the most photographed neighbourhood in Africa

things.name: Boulders Beach Penguin Colony
things.description: African penguins swimming alongside humans at a sheltered bay

things.name: Constantia Wine Valley
things.description: World's oldest wine region outside Europe producing outstanding Sauvignon Blanc

things.name: Chapman's Peak Drive
things.description: One of the world's most spectacular coastal drives carved into sheer sea cliffs

things.name: Hout Bay & Cape Fur Seals
things.description: Take a boat to Seal Island where 75,000 Cape Fur Seals live on a granite rock

things.name: Braai (South African Barbecue)
things.description: The national ritual - boerewors sausage, lamb chops and sosaties over an open fire
